name: Chris Van Hollen (via DSCC.org)
subject: You inspire me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
As we close the books on 2017, I want to say thank you for your unparalleled support and activism throughout the year.
---
[****](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20180101-VanHollen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team,

As we close the books on 2017, I want to say thank you for your unparalleled support and activism throughout the year.

2017 was a turbulent year for our nation and the world. Just before Republicans headed home for the holidays, they passed a shameful tax scam that will increase taxes on middle-class families and add trillions to our debt -- all to provide a windfall giveaway to President Trump and his billionaire buddies.

And they skipped town without passing a long-term budget, funding the Children's Health Insurance Program, or dealing with the long-term needs of our economy, our national security, and our nation.

But as Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. reminded us, "only in the darkness can you see the stars."

The challenges we face are difficult, but they have also awakened Americans to see the stars and participate more actively in shaping our society and building a brighter future.

Grassroots Democrats like you have been standing strong, rallying friends and neighbors to defend our values, and even electing the first Democratic Senator out of Alabama since 1992.

**As DSCC chair, I 've been so inspired by the commitment and dedication of supporters like you -- and I know that if you continue to stay engaged, we can take our country back in 2018.**

Senate Democrats are so grateful for all that you did in 2017. I hope we can count on you to keep standing up for the values we believe in and to continue fighting to make this country a place where every individual can live with dignity and respect.

Thank you for being a part of this fight,

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator and DSCC Chair

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d77b/2b07114c/a74ced84/731a35ee/892412155/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d77b/2b07114c/a74ced84/731a35e9/892412155/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d77b/2b07114c/a74ced84/731a35e8/892412155/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: The White House
subject: Off and running
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec1ffe5503f559d1e6860dcae5d671690538aecb184f2bf5409a92e4a7ec36e316e2623446d997dd7c5d8fb97f2983aa575944a7f6284f41

Off and running

After spending Christmas with the First Family in Florida, President Donald J. Trump returned to Washington yesterday. In 2018, his Administration will look to build on a remarkable first calendar year in office.

A few of the 2017 highlights:

- Kicking the American economy into high gear with $5.5 trillion in tax cuts, 1.7 million new jobs, and more than 60 record highs for the Dow Jones index
- Putting America first in trade by withdrawing from the Trans-Pacific Partnership and working to modernize NAFTA
- Making government more accountable, including by nominating 73 conservative federal judges
- Promoting peace through strength by rebuilding the U.S. military and repelling ISIS across Syria and Iraq
“HAPPY NEW YEAR!,” the President tweeted Sunday evening. “We are MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, and much faster than anyone thought possible!”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec1ffe5503f559d1b43e282545d60890577206939ad5b9b634c25a9449d2b0dd089231f9962d4e5c70b0b8e1346f42f3735b72bd05ce662b
Watch important moments for President Trump in 2017.

Tax cuts: ‘The numbers will speak’

Before the Christmas holiday, President Trump signed the Tax Cuts Act into law, fulfilling a major campaign promise to the American people.

“As you know, $3.2 trillion in tax cuts for American families, including the doubling of the standard deduction and the doubling of the child tax credit,” the President said during the signing ceremony. “The typical family of four earning $75,000 will see an income tax cut of more than $2,000 . . . [And] because we’re signing today, they’re going to start to see that in February. The numbers will speak.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ec1ffe5503f559d1598bfe228c169a37c1327bd4d5418c53b9a50b99f6b4f1b81bfaffbb04950c12f1d6f286691db5bda760945dddaaaeb6
Read more about the promise of middle-class tax cuts.

January is National Mentoring Month

This week marks the beginning of National Mentoring Month—an initiative started and endorsed by President George W. Bush in 2002 to promote youth mentoring.

In a Presidential Message yesterday, President Trump reiterated the importance of this work to building a strong nation in the years to come. Specifically, he encouraged all Americans to reflect on how they might use their time and talents to change the life of a child, whether it be through teaching, religious guidance, community leadership, or even simple friendship.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7dbe77dc3096dab4a6ef03204a484f746c9a3c9d53857f4bc4aad729db2f1efe9cb9153b190012cef5f3e85650ab07dc28516a0e50e7202c
Read President Trump’s message here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump holds a video teleconference with members of the U.S. military | December 24, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will have lunch with Vice President Mike Pence and Secretary of Labor Alexander Acosta.

COMING UP

Tomorrow, the President will have lunch with Vice President Pence, Secretary of State Rex Tillerson, and Secretary of Defense James Mattis.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7dbe77dc3096dab4a8709e046edd18872be13b80291ac5a0ab669501fdf9e365ecfc2b6071cf66806b651063b0667c72c31900f07665befd
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=7dbe77dc3096dab40da28209b2169c07837afb03ce134c8915a9faf1363e091cacb87f4ce1529e99e446d7b69dc99be26327f0999071d3a4
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d44bf65f22c0b58e7d0662cf7d7c203abac61316a293f714c0dfae99a7efa9b51007aafdc7b3bbac4ef111c20a9f5ee9f8
Unsubscribe

name: Team Maggie
subject: The Koch Brothers' Political Influence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf93/2a380d31/12bb378/f1c940/2257361719/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf93/2a380d31/12bb378/f1c940/2257361719/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello --
During her campaign, Senator Hassan pledged to Granite Staters and people across the country that she would take action to help ensure that money does not control our elections.
That's why she joined 45 of her colleagues in introducing the DISCLOSE Act of 2017, a bill that requires any organization that participates in political spending to disclose its major donors -- restoring accountability and making sure that voters know who is behind political advertising.
**The DISCLOSE Act is a major first step toward counteracting the devastating Citizens United decision and ensuring that a wealthy few (like Karl Rove and the Koch Brothers) don 't control our elections.**
Unfortunately, many Republicans in Congress are resistant to passing the DISCLOSE Act -- maybe because some of the major donors who bankroll their campaigns would be exposed for cutting million dollar checks to elect the candidates of their choosing.
Our political system needs more transparency, not less. That's why we're asking you to call on Congress to pass the DISCLOSE Act and let Americans see who is trying to buy their vote.**[Please, join our grassroots movement and sign the petition now.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf93/2a380d31/12bb378/f1c941/2257361719/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/discloseact/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdiscloseact-up%3Frefcode%3D%25source%25")**
The 2018-midterm elections are just under a year away, and the Koch Brothers are already trying to buy elections for Republicans across the country.
Passing the DISCLOSE Act is the best way to hold the Kochs accountable for their bought-and-sold political influence, so we need you to speak out.
[**Please sign now to call on Congress to pass the DISCLOSE Act and restore transparency to our elections.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf93/2a380d31/12bb378/f1c941/2257361719/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/discloseact/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdiscloseact-up%3Frefcode%3D%25source%25")
Thank you for taking action,
Team Maggie
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf93/2a380d31/12bb378/f1c942/2257361719/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZGlzY2xvc2VhY3QtdXAiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDEwMl9ESVNDTE9TRUFjdEpBcnNfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/discloseact-up?refcode=e20180102_DISCLOSEActJArs_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf93/2a380d31/12bb378/f1c943/2257361719/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Concord, NH 03302 United States

That's why she joined 45 of her colleagues in introducing the DISCLOSE Act of 2017, a bill that requires any organization that participates in political spending to disclose its major donors -- restoring accountability and making sure that voters know who is behind political advertising. The DISCLOSE Act is a major first step toward counteracting the devastating Citizens United decision and ensuring that a wealthy few (like Karl Rove and the Koch Brothers) don 't control our elections. Unfortunately, many Republicans in Congress are resistant to passing the DISCLOSE Act -- maybe because some of the major donors who bankroll their campaigns would be exposed for cutting million dollar checks to elect the candidates of their choosing. Our political system needs more transparency, not less. That's why we're asking you to call on Congress to pass the DISCLOSE Act and let Americans see who is trying to buy their vote. "" The 2018-midterm elections are just under a year away, and the Koch Brothers are already trying to buy elections for Republicans across the country. Passing the DISCLOSE Act is the best way to hold the Kochs accountable for their bought-and-sold political influence, so we need you to speak out. "" Thank you for taking action, Team Maggie ""

name: Chairwoman Terrie Rizzo
subject: Our plan for the new year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Friend,

Thank you to everyone who contributed before our final 2017 fundraising deadline!

Grassroots donations power our work to elect Democrats, and that's why I want you to be one of the first to hear our big plan for 2018.

In all 67 counties in Florida, Republicans have put corporations and the ultra-wealthy ahead of their constituents. That's why we're launching a 67-County Solution, supporting Democrats in every county running for office in 2018.

[**Are you in to support Democrats statewide in 2018? Click here to say "I'm in!" >>**](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/stand-up-for-florida-democrats-in-all-67-counties?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Are+you+in+to+support+Democrats+statewid&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1") [Support Democrats in 2018!](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/stand-up-for-florida-democrats-in-all-67-counties?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Support+Democrats+in+2018&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1") We shouldn't have a single family in Florida struggling to keep a roof over their heads or having to choose between healthcare or food.

We need to engage and empower Democrats in Bay County just like we do in Broward County. That's why our 67-County Solution is so important to turning Florida blue in 2018.

[**Will you stand with me? Add your name and show your support for Democrats in 2018 today!**](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/stand-up-for-florida-democrats-in-all-67-counties?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+stand+with+me+Add+your+name+and&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1")

Thank you again for your support,
Terrie

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bf3f/1a5213b3/7254d89b/718b3256/2718841095/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180102_1_1") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Team Maggie
subject: Steve Bannon, Donald Trump, & 2018 [survey enclosed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf90/2a380d31/126136a/f1c9aa/3985971594/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf90/2a380d31/126136a/f1c9aa/3985971594/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
You're the reason Maggie Hassan is in the Senate, everyone.
You're why she gets up every day to fight to protect access to affordable health care and make sure that we ALL have a chance to get ahead and stay ahead, not just those at the top.
As we kick off 2018, Senator Hassan would like to know what's important to you. She'd like to know what your favorite and most disappointing moments of 2017 were, and she'd like to know how you're feeling about Steve Bannon, Donald Trump, and the midterms elections.
It looks like you haven't had a chance to take our short, three-question survey yet. [**We 're giving Senator Hassan the answers later tonight, so will you please take a minute to share your thoughts?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf90/2a380d31/126136a/f1c9ab/3985971594/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20171231_2017survey_act?source=e20180102_2017survey2_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for taking the time,
Team Maggie
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf90/2a380d31/126136a/f1c994/3985971594/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNy1zdXJ2ZXktdXAiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDEwMl8yMDE3c3VydmV5Ml9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017-survey-up?refcode=e20180102_2017survey2_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf90/2a380d31/126136a/f1c995/3985971594/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: EMILY's List
subject: 📝 Our to-do list for 2018
body:

# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
